title: Finders Fishers
description: A simple datapack that adds some bundles to the fishing loot table
body:
Have you ever wondered what other people might have dropped in the rivers and oceans? Well now you can find out!

Finders Fishers is a small datapack that adds new fishing loot to the game. Fish up bundles with assorted items from the fishers who came before you! What treasures might they have dropped?

If you've got suggestions for how to improve this datapack, feel free to leave them on [Github](https://github.com/mmsheeks/finders-fishers/issues/new)!

Based on original concept from @friskipoo on TikTok
